cases.name: serialized_position_allocation
cases.expected: every ActiveModel comment insert locks the tenant thread row before reading the highest position and overwrites caller-supplied position with the next checked value

cases.name: exact_active_comment_count
cases.expected: every existing thread ActiveModel save locks the tenant thread row and replaces caller-supplied comment_count with the number of tenant comments whose deleted_at is null

cases.name: historical_counter_repair
cases.expected: the append-only migration recalculates all stored thread counters from active owner rows for PostgreSQL and SQLite

cases.name: historical_position_repair
cases.expected: the migration deterministically ranks existing comments by position, creation time, and id within each thread before adding the uniqueness constraint

cases.name: bulk_bypass_rejection
cases.expected: a unique thread_id plus position index rejects direct Entity insert paths that bypass ActiveModelBehavior

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute concurrent PostgreSQL create and soft-delete transactions against one existing thread
retain final active-row count and gap-free unique position evidence
retain migration output for a fixture containing stale counters and duplicate positions
